message:
🐛 Fix null-safety crashes in ClusterComparison, ResourceUsage, EventSummary

- Guard Math.max(...[]) against empty arrays returning -Infinity (#5141)
- Guard .split('/') on possibly undefined node.cluster (#5142, #5143)
- Guard division by zero in progress bar width calculation (#5144)
- Guard .split('/').pop() on possibly undefined event.cluster (#5145)

Fixes #5141, #5142, #5143, #5144, #5145

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
